name: Apple Quiche
recipeIngredient: 3 3/4 cups peeled, cored and thinly sliced Granny Smith apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Line a 9-inch pie plate with pastry. Crimp the edge and prick the bottom and sides with a fork at 1/2-inch intervals.
3. To prevent shrinkage, set an 8-inch round cake pan into the pie shell (or line it snugly with aluminum foil).
4. Bake for 6 minutes. Remove the cake pan or foil and continue to bake the shell until lightly browned, about 10 minutes.
5. Remove from oven and layer half of the apples, sugar, and cinnamon in the pie shell. Repeat layers and cover completely with cheese.
6. Beat the eggs with cream. Make a small hole in the cheese and pour the egg mixture into it. Cover the hole with cheese.
7. Bake for about 1 hour until the top is browned and the apples are tender when tested with a fork.
8. Cool for 10 to 15 minutes before cutting into wedges. Makes 6 servings.
